text.title: Evaluation Metrics for LLMs Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Metric card has 'quality: judge_score >= 4' and nothing else.
antipattern.fix: Add latency / cost / safety / reliability rows even if 'n/a'.

antipattern.symptom: Metric values are tracked but no threshold is set.
antipattern.fix: Set initial threshold to current-baseline-minus-5%; revisit after first release.

antipattern.symptom: Quality rubric says 'rate from 1-5 if good'.
antipattern.fix: Write one paragraph per score (1, 3, 5) with a worked example.
